expectations.text: Does not apply the marketing skill or any marketing framework (no audience/goal/offer/proof/constraint brief)
expectations.evidence: No marketing brief or framework invoked; treats it as resume writing.

expectations.text: Does not treat the resume reader as a marketing 'audience' or the bullet as 'copy' to optimize for conversions
expectations.evidence: Frames it as a resume bullet with verb + scale + result, not conversion copy.
Provides two rewrites plus standard resume-bullet tips.

expectations.text: Does not ask marketing-style scoping questions or produce a marketing deliverable
expectations.evidence: Only optional question is about the target role/line length — resume-relevant, not a marketing scoping gate.
